title: Simple account credit
descricao: Usa MOVE, ADD e DISPLAY para creditar valor em saldo.
description: Uses MOVE, ADD and DISPLAY to credit an amount into balance.
codigo:
IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. CREDITO-CONTA.

       DATA DIVISION.
       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-SALDO   PIC 9(7)V99 VALUE 1500.00.
       01 WS-CREDITO PIC 9(7)V99 VALUE 250.00.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           ADD WS-CREDITO TO WS-SALDO
           DISPLAY "NOVO SALDO: " WS-SALDO
           STOP RUN.

title: Daily interest calculation
descricao: Usa COMPUTE para calcular juros sobre saldo.
description: Uses COMPUTE to calculate interest on balance.
codigo:
IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. JUROS-DIARIOS.

       DATA DIVISION.
       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-SALDO    PIC 9(7)V99 VALUE 10000.00.
       01 WS-TAXA-DIA PIC 9V9999   VALUE 0.0015.
       01 WS-JUROS    PIC 9(7)V99.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           COMPUTE WS-JUROS = WS-SALDO * WS-TAXA-DIA
           DISPLAY "JUROS DO DIA: " WS-JUROS
           STOP RUN.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION.

title: Negative balance check
descricao: Usa IF/ELSE para checar uso de cheque especial.

title: Transaction type handling
descricao: Usa EVALUATE para decidir ação com base no tipo.
description: Uses EVALUATE to decide action based on type.
codigo:
IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. TIPO-TRANSACAO.

       DATA DIVISION.
       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-TIPO PIC X VALUE "S".

       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           EVALUATE WS-TIPO
              WHEN "D"
                 DISPLAY "TRANSACAO DE DEBITO"
              WHEN "C"
                 DISPLAY "TRANSACAO DE CREDITO"
              WHEN "S"
                 DISPLAY "TRANSACAO DE SAQUE"
              WHEN OTHER
                 DISPLAY "TIPO INVALIDO"
           END-EVALUATE
           STOP RUN.

title: Statement file read
descricao: Usa OPEN, READ e CLOSE em arquivo de entrada.
description: Uses OPEN, READ and CLOSE on input file.
codigo:
IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. LE-EXTRATO.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.
       FILE-CONTROL.
           SELECT EXTRATO ASSIGN TO "extrato.txt"
              ORGANIZATION IS LINE SEQUENTIAL.

       DATA DIVISION.
       FILE SECTION.
       FD EXTRATO.
       01 REG-EXTRATO PIC X(80).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           OPEN INPUT EXTRATO
           READ EXTRATO
              AT END DISPLAY "ARQUIVO VAZIO"
              NOT AT END DISPLAY "REGISTRO: " REG-EXTRATO
           END-READ
           CLOSE EXTRATO
           STOP RUN.

title: Read until end of file
descricao: Usa READ AT END com PERFORM UNTIL.
description: Uses READ AT END with PERFORM UNTIL.
codigo:
IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. PROCESSA-LOTE.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.
       FILE-CONTROL.
           SELECT LOTE ASSIGN TO "lote.txt"
              ORGANIZATION IS LINE SEQUENTIAL.

       DATA DIVISION.
       FILE SECTION.
       FD LOTE.
       01 REG-LOTE PIC X(80).

       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-FIM PIC X VALUE "N".

       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           OPEN INPUT LOTE
           PERFORM UNTIL WS-FIM = "S"
              READ LOTE
                 AT END MOVE "S" TO WS-FIM
                 NOT AT END DISPLAY "PROC: " REG-LOTE
              END-READ
           END-PERFORM
           CLOSE LOTE
           STOP RUN.

title: Key navigation with START and READ NEXT

title: SMS composition with STRING
descricao: Usa STRING para compor mensagem ao cliente.
description: Uses STRING to build a message to the client.
codigo:
IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. SMS-SALDO.

       DATA DIVISION.
       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-NOME      PIC X(20) VALUE "CARLOS".
       01 WS-MSG       PIC X(80).
       01 WS-SALDO-TXT PIC X(15) VALUE "1500,00".

       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           STRING
              "OLA " DELIMITED BY SIZE
              WS-NOME DELIMITED BY SPACE
              ", SEU SALDO E R$ " DELIMITED BY SIZE
              WS-SALDO-TXT DELIMITED BY SIZE
              INTO WS-MSG
           END-STRING
           DISPLAY WS-MSG
           STOP RUN.

title: Line split with UNSTRING
descricao: Usa UNSTRING para separar campos delimitados por ponto e vírgula.
description: Uses UNSTRING to split semicolon-delimited fields.
codigo:
IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. PARSE-RETORNO.

       DATA DIVISION.
       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-LINHA     PIC X(60) VALUE "12345;PAGO;250.90;20260416".
       01 WS-NOSSO-NUM PIC X(10).
       01 WS-STATUS    PIC X(10).
       01 WS-VALOR     PIC X(10).
       01 WS-DATA      PIC X(08).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           UNSTRING WS-LINHA DELIMITED BY ";"
              INTO WS-NOSSO-NUM WS-STATUS WS-VALOR WS-DATA
           END-UNSTRING
           DISPLAY WS-NOSSO-NUM " " WS-STATUS " " WS-VALOR " " WS-DATA
           STOP RUN.

title: Linear search with SEARCH
descricao: Usa SEARCH em tabela de agências.
description: Uses SEARCH on a branch table.
codigo:
IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. BUSCA-AGENCIA.

       DATA DIVISION.
       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 TAB-AGENCIAS.
          05 AG-ITEM OCCURS 3 TIMES INDEXED BY IDX-AG.
             10 AG-COD  PIC 9(4).
             10 AG-NOME PIC X(20).
       01 WS-BUSCA PIC 9(4) VALUE 1020.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           MOVE 1001 TO AG-COD(1)
           MOVE 1020 TO AG-COD(2)
           MOVE 1050 TO AG-COD(3)
           SEARCH AG-ITEM
              AT END DISPLAY "AGENCIA NAO ENCONTRADA"
              WHEN AG-COD(IDX-AG) = WS-BUSCA
                 DISPLAY "AGENCIA ENCONTRADA"
           END-SEARCH
           STOP RUN.

title: Binary search with SEARCH ALL
descricao: Usa SEARCH ALL em tabela ordenada de tarifas.
description: Uses SEARCH ALL on a sorted fee table.
codigo:
IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. BUSCA-TARIFA.

       DATA DIVISION.
       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 TAB-TARIFAS.
          05 TAR-ITEM OCCURS 4 TIMES ASCENDING KEY IS TAR-COD INDEXED BY IDX-TAR.
             10 TAR-COD   PIC 9(3).
             10 TAR-VALOR PIC 9(3)V99.
       01 WS-COD-BUSCA PIC 9(3) VALUE 120.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           MOVE 100 TO TAR-COD(1)
           MOVE 120 TO TAR-COD(2)
           MOVE 130 TO TAR-COD(3)
           MOVE 150 TO TAR-COD(4)
           SEARCH ALL TAR-ITEM
              WHEN TAR-COD(IDX-TAR) = WS-COD-BUSCA
                 DISPLAY "TARIFA LOCALIZADA"
              WHEN OTHER
                 DISPLAY "TARIFA NAO LOCALIZADA"
           END-SEARCH
           STOP RUN.

title: Populate transaction table
descricao: Usa OCCURS com PERFORM VARYING.
description: Uses OCCURS with PERFORM VARYING.
codigo:

       PROGRAM-ID. TAB-LANCAMENTOS.

       DATA DIVISION.
       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-I PIC 9.
       01 TAB-LANC.
          05 LANC OCCURS 5 TIMES.
             10 LANC-VALOR PIC 9(5)V99.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-I > 5
              COMPUTE LANC-VALOR(WS-I) = WS-I * 100
              DISPLAY "LANC " WS-I " = " LANC-VALOR(WS-I)
           END-PERFORM
           STOP RUN.

title: Early exit with EXIT PERFORM
descricao: Usa EXIT PERFORM ao encontrar transação suspeita.
description: Uses EXIT PERFORM when a suspicious transaction is found.
codigo:
IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. SAI-LOOP.

       DATA DIVISION.
       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-I     PIC 9.
       01 WS-VALOR PIC 9(5)V99.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-I > 5
              COMPUTE WS-VALOR = WS-I * 3000
              IF WS-VALOR > 9000
                 DISPLAY "TRANSACAO SUSPEITA"
                 EXIT PERFORM
              END-IF
           END-PERFORM
           STOP RUN.
code:

       PROGRAM-ID. SAI-LOOP.

       DATA DIVISION.
       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.

       01 WS-VALOR PIC 9(5)V99.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-I > 5

              IF WS-VALOR > 9000
                 DISPLAY "TRANSACAO SUSPEITA"
                 EXIT PERFORM
              END-IF
           END-PERFORM
           STOP RUN.

titulo: Uso de CONTINUE e NEXT SENTENCE
title: Using CONTINUE and NEXT SENTENCE
descricao: Exemplo simples com CONTINUE e NEXT SENTENCE.
description: Simple example with CONTINUE and NEXT SENTENCE.
codigo:
IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. CONTINUE-EX.

       DATA DIVISION.
       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-FLAG PIC X VALUE "N".

       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           IF WS-FLAG = "S"
              DISPLAY "PROCESSAR"
           ELSE
              CONTINUE
           END-IF

           IF WS-FLAG = "X"
              NEXT SENTENCE
           END-IF

           DISPLAY "FIM DA REGRA"
           STOP RUN.

title: Quote lookup in table
descricao: Usa SEARCH para buscar cotação do dia.
description: Uses SEARCH to find daily quote.
codigo:
IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. BUSCA-COTACAO.

       DATA DIVISION.
       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 TAB-COT.
          05 ITEM OCCURS 2 TIMES INDEXED BY IDX.
             10 COD-MOEDA PIC X(3).
             10 VLR-MOEDA PIC 9(3)V999.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           MOVE "USD" TO COD-MOEDA(1)
           MOVE "EUR" TO COD-MOEDA(2)
           SEARCH ITEM
              WHEN COD-MOEDA(IDX) = "USD"
                 DISPLAY "COTACAO USD LOCALIZADA"
           END-SEARCH
           STOP RUN.

title: Push message formatting
descricao: Usa STRING para criar alerta de compra no cartão.
description: Uses STRING to create a card purchase alert.
codigo:
IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. PUSH-COMPRA.

       DATA DIVISION.
       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-LOJA PIC X(20) VALUE "SUPERMERCADO".
       01 WS-MSG  PIC X(60).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           STRING "COMPRA APROVADA EM " DELIMITED BY SIZE
                  WS-LOJA DELIMITED BY SPACE
              INTO WS-MSG
           END-STRING
           DISPLAY WS-MSG
           STOP RUN.

title: Consent module call
descricao: Usa CALL para integração com rotina de consentimento.
description: Uses CALL to integrate with consent routine.
codigo:
IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. OPEN-FINANCE.

       DATA DIVISION.
       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-CPF     PIC X(11) VALUE "11122233344".
       01 WS-STATUS  PIC X VALUE SPACE.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           CALL "CONSENTE-OF" USING WS-CPF WS-STATUS
           DISPLAY "STATUS CONSENTIMENTO: " WS-STATUS
           STOP RUN.

title: Monthly premium with COMPUTE
descricao: Usa COMPUTE para calcular prêmio mensal.
description: Uses COMPUTE to calculate monthly premium.
codigo:
IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. PREMIO-SEGURO.

       DATA DIVISION.
       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-VALOR-BASE PIC 9(5)V99 VALUE 2500.00.
       01 WS-TAXA       PIC 9V9999   VALUE 0.0120.
       01 WS-PREMIO     PIC 9(5)V99.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           COMPUTE WS-PREMIO = WS-VALOR-BASE * WS-TAXA
           DISPLAY "PREMIO: " WS-PREMIO
           STOP RUN.
code:
